title: Superior Vanilla
description: Vanilla, but SUPERIOR! Improving, fixing and re-imagining Minecraft's textures.
body:
Vanilla, but SUPERIOR! The pack is 1.17 ready!

![Texture pack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aPDPZbr6/images/492de5f8a0dc944601b01d42c00e3615bb68e801.webp)

This pack combines all of my previous packs(Natural Melon, Square Melon Slices, Actually Blackstone, Ultimate Bossbars, Cleaner Diorite, Centered Discs & Superior Tools) plus all of the third-party packs listed down below!

Credits:

ic22487 (farmland sides):
- sites.google.com/view/ictexturepacks/home?authuser=0

Chacky (soul deadwood):
- www.planetminecraft.com/member/chacky/

Vanilla Tweaks (animated campfires && double slab models):
- vanillatweaks.net/

FunnyCaptain (variated ores && blue cod):
- www.planetminecraft.com/member/funnycaptain/

whetshu (beacon model):
- www.planetminecraft.com/member/whetshu/

Nyliumij (cactus bottom):
- www.planetminecraft.com/member/nyliumij/

Stormdragon77 (brown leather && fixed inconsistencies):
- www.planetminecraft.com/member/stormdragon77/

Daggsy (cracked anvil sides):
- www.planetminecraft.com/member/daggsy/

Napsta (item frame, dropper and dispenser):
- www.planetminecraft.com/member/napstablooky22/

noatryy (elytra)
- www.planetminecraft.com/member/noatryy/

AngelofArt (clay ball)
- www.reddit.com/user/AngelofArt
